description: You are a freelance audiobook narrator working with Blackthorn Publishing. You have just finished recording Chapter 5 of the novel 'The Last Meridian' by Eleanor Voss and need to prepare the recording for delivery per the publisher's ACX production specifications. Using the production brief at /home/ga/Audio/audiobook_project/production_brief.txt and the narration audio file at /home/ga/Audio/audiobook_project/narration_chapter.wav, set up the Ardour session (44100 Hz). Rename the narration track to exactly 'Ch05 - The Awakening' and place point markers for 'Room Tone' (0:00), 'Narration Begin' (0:02), 'Paragraph 2' (0:10), 'Paragraph 3' (0:18), and 'Narration End' (0:28). Create a range marker named 'Retail Sample' spanning from 0:05 to 0:20. Export the full session mix and the Retail Sample range as WAV files to /home/ga/Audio/audiobook_delivery/, ensuring the filenames contain 'chapter' and 'retail' or 'sample' respectively. Save the session upon completion.
